conditions.name: Hypertension
conditions.notes: Blood pressure typically elevated in mornings

conditions.name: Mild Cognitive Impairment
conditions.notes: Occasional memory lapses, especially for prospective tasks

medications.name: Lisinopril
medications.instructions: Take with food to reduce dizziness. Do not skip doses.

medications.name: Vitamin D3
medications.instructions: Take with breakfast for better absorption

appointments.purpose: Review blood pressure readings and adjust medication
preparation: Bring blue medical record book with BP logs

doctor_instructions.instruction: Take medication consistently every morning after breakfast. Missing doses can cause blood pressure spikes.
doctor_instructions.context: After reviewing December readings showing missed doses

doctor_instructions.instruction: Record blood pressure twice daily - morning and evening. Bring the blue book to every appointment.
